title: Ligia passerina
taxonomy: Ligia passerina is a species of semi-terrestrial isopod crustacean, commonly known as pill bugs or rolly pollies. It belongs to the family Gomodidae and the order Isopoda. More specifically, Ligia passerina can be classified as follows: Kingdom: Animalia, Phylum: Arthropoda, Class: Malacostraca, Order: Isopoda, Family: Gomodidae, and Genus: Ligia. These classification categories reflect the evolutionary relationships and distinct characteristics of the species. This classification system is widely used in biology and zoology to identify and organize different species within the animal kingdom.
